# PHIL.059 ? Pragmatism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** modern_western
**Subcategory:** pragmatism
**Domain:** MODERN_WESTERN
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Truth as what works; meaning in practical consequences; anti-foundationalism; experimental attitude; pluralism

## Application
Test ideas by practical results; focus on consequences not origins; experimental approach; multiple valid perspectives; actionable truth

## Key Values
- Practical consequences
- Experimentalism
- Anti-foundationalism
- Pluralism

philosophy, modern-western, pragmatism
